properties.name: platform.logging.enabled
properties.description: Master switch for the platform logging library.

properties.name: platform.logging.metadata.application-name
properties.description: Application name stamped into MDC. Falls back to spring.application.name.

properties.name: platform.logging.metadata.environment
properties.description: Environment name stamped into MDC. Falls back to spring.profiles.active.

properties.name: platform.logging.metadata.host
properties.description: Host or container identifier. Defaults to InetAddress.getLocalHost().
